addition.item: Added full Joomla 6 native DevArt Events package
Added administrator component for managing events, categories, tags and venues
Added frontend module for displaying event lists
Added support for multiple event dates per event
Added Today, Upcoming, Past, All and Featured event views
Added venue manager with saved venues and manual venue support
Added map picker support for event and venue locations
Added Google Maps and OpenStreetMap rendering support
Added calendar display with event popups
Added Joomla menu items for event listings, calendar and event detail views
Added event image, contact, website and social link fields
Added Google Event JSON-LD structured data
Added import and export tools for DevArt Events data backup
Added GitHub-based Joomla update server support

change.item: Frontend event ordering is based on event dates instead of created or publish dates
Today events are ordered by event time ascending
Upcoming events are ordered by next available event date ascending
Past events are ordered by latest past event date descending
All events are ordered by latest event date descending
Administrator sorting follows Joomla-style list behavior for events, categories and tags
Frontend rendering optimized for editorial, cultural, municipal and high-traffic event websites

security.item: Added ACL support for administrator operations
Added CSRF protection for administrator actions
Added safe output escaping for administrator and frontend rendering
Added controlled map URL rendering for frontend map output
Built for Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+ using modern namespaces and production-safe architecture

note.item: Initial public stable release of DevArt Events for Joomla 6
Built for Joomla 6 only with PHP 8.2+
No migration required for new installations
Always test on a staging environment before production deployment
